actions.expression:
SELECT giftreporting.sid,
       giftreporting.ctime,
       giftreporting.GiftName,
       giftreporting.Money,
       giftreporting.A0101,
       giftreporting.e0122,
       giftreporting.H01T0,
       giftreporting.Disposal,
       giftreporting.xmlb
FROM giftreporting 
WHERE (giftreporting.cs_id=[专业工厂.厂商编号]) 
  AND (giftreporting.xmlb="收礼上报") 
ORDER BY giftreporting.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT giftreportingsheet1.sid,
       giftreportingsheet1.ctime,
       giftreportingsheet1.xmlb,
       giftreportingsheet1.CooperationYear,
       giftreportingsheet1.OrderProperties,
       giftreportingsheet1.Com,
       giftreportingsheet1.Dep,
       giftreportingsheet1.IsContinue,
       giftreportingsheet1.ContinueReason,
       giftreportingsheet1.Problem
FROM giftreportingsheet1 
WHERE (giftreportingsheet1.cs_id=[专业工厂.厂商编号]) 
ORDER BY giftreportingsheet1.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT giftreportingsheet.sid,
       giftreportingsheet.xmlb,
       giftreportingsheet.visitDate,
       giftreportingsheet.visitPerson,
       giftreportingsheet.IsVisit,
       giftreportingsheet.Content
FROM giftreportingsheet 
WHERE (giftreportingsheet.cs_id=[专业工厂.厂商编号]) 
ORDER BY giftreportingsheet.sid ASC

       gongcsp.ajbh,
       gongcsp.zwpm,
       gongcsp.cgry,

       p.sj,
       p.ltuthg,
       p.sdjy,
       p.cgtc,
       p.gdtc,
       p.yjdj,
       p.sfhs,
       p.aybl,
       p.asl6,
       p.ayj,
       p.cpgg,
       p.krddh,
       p.hyd,
       p.ypgs,
       p.pgxs,
       p.pgchxq,
       p.htrq,
       p.cgry,
       p.xjht,
       p.yhje,
       p.tpscsj,
       p.fktt,
       p.xddd,
       p.khmc,
       p.gcpp,
       p.cyxq,
       p.tphh,
       p.ksbh,
       p.wxxs,
       p.cgpath,
       p.chsl1,
       p.sfhz,
       p.dggj,
       p.wxgsbz,
       p.ksdhh,
       p.pxbj,
       p.fljg,
       p.flzj,
       p.cghl,
       p.cgzje1,
       p.wxwyzd1,
       p.wxbm,
       p.cgbm,
       p.chsy,
       p.chzl
FROM cghtsheet AS p 
INNER 
JOIN (
SELECT bjhh,MAX(sid) AS htrq12 
FROM cghtsheet 
WHERE xjht="新" 
GROUP BY bjhh) AS latest 
  ON p.bjhh = latest.bjhh 
  AND p.sid = latest.htrq12 
WHERE (p.sccj1id =[专业工厂.厂商编号]) 
  AND (p.xjht = "新") 
  AND ((p.gdry=:_user_username_) 
  OR (p.cgry=:_user_username_) 
  OR (p.cgbh=:_user_username_) 
  OR (p.ywpath LIKE "%部门%") 
  OR (p.cgpath LIKE "%部门%")) AND (:_user_username_ not LIKE "%U%") 
ORDER BY p.htrq desc

actions.name: 对应产品
actions.caption: 对应产品
actions.expression:
SELECT zscp.sid 
FROM zscp 
WHERE (zscp.cpbh=[专业工厂.工厂评分.评分人员]) and permission('专业产品')
ORDER BY zscp.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应开模信息
actions.caption: 对应开模信息
actions.expression:
SELECT gckm.sid 
FROM gckm 
WHERE (gckm.wyzd=[专业工厂.开模信息表.唯一字段]) 
ORDER BY gckm.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应赔款信息
actions.caption: 对应赔款信息
actions.expression:
SELECT gongcsp.sid 
FROM gongcsp 
WHERE (gongcsp.ajbh=[专业工厂.工厂赔款详情.案件编号]) 
ORDER BY gongcsp.sid ASC

actions.name: 工厂核查
actions.caption: 工厂核查
actions.expression:
SELECT exceptioncheck.sid 
FROM exceptioncheck 
WHERE (exceptioncheck.cs_id=[专业工厂.厂商编号]) 
ORDER BY exceptioncheck.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-外箱体积
actions.caption: 计算-外箱体积
actions.expression: [专业工厂.工厂产品.外箱长度]*[专业工厂.工厂产品.外箱宽度]*[专业工厂.工厂产品.外箱高度]/1000000
actions.output: 专业工厂.工厂产品.外箱体积

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="结算条件")
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="专业工厂")

SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="专业工厂")
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="结算详细")

view.title:
可否开票填可以则有开票要求不可以则无
  定 金(万)（？--默认为0则不显示在结算方式,填充为数字）
（付款比例%--默认是100% ，0 则不显示在结算方式填充为0-100整数）
（结算条件--如无特殊请在下拉中选）
（结算详细--如无特殊请在下拉中选）
（余款比例%--默认是0 则不显示在结算方式填充为0-100整数）
（余款见票%--默认是0 则不显示在结算方式填充一般为数字）
（注：结算详细只能在下拉中选）

view.params:
SELECT dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.rid=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="特殊结算方式")  group by dxkzsheet.xznr

   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="管理人数")
